public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as deck broker.
appearance: Varek Duststep usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their deck broker status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Treats exchange as a social instrument as much as an economic one, reading appetite and hesitation alike. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a deck broker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of deck broker in and around South Swirling Fleet, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep South Swirling Fleet workable through the obligations of deck broker while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep exchange moving despite scarcity, theft risk, tariffs, and reputational damage. Around South Swirling Fleet, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of deck broker visibly slip.

Varek Duststep needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around South Swirling Fleet before trust collapses.
